scenario: VS-backed MCP tool invoked while the VSIX named-pipe side is inactive
diagnostic: VS MCP Bridge is not active. Launch the Visual Studio Experimental Instance, open View -> Other Windows -> VS MCP Bridge, ensure the tool window initializes the VSIX named-pipe side, then retry the VS-backed MCP tool.
observedBoundaries: MCP server receives VS-backed tool request
request id is preserved in diagnostic response
operatorAction: Open View -> Other Windows -> VS MCP Bridge
Wait for the tool window to initialize the VSIX named-pipe side
